name: Groupe Pizzorno Environnement
summary: Groupe Pizzorno Environnement provides environmental services primarily in France. It engages in the collection, sorting, recycling, and treatment of household and industrial waste. The company also provides cleaning and sanitation solutions. In addition, it engages in the materials recovery; development of organic recovery; and production of heat and energy from waste treatment. The company was founded in 1974 and is based in Draguignan, France.
